programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Potato. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Potato dedicating a song to his Uncle Spud.
Nature Explorer. Children's animation. Bing and his friends play nature explorers in Amma's garden by spinning a giant colour wheel and then finding something of that colour.
Treasure Trail. Preschool series. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po follow a trail of flowers that leads them to some very special treasure.
Waiting. Tomo is coming around for a playdate and Tee finds that waiting patiently for his friend to arrive is very difficult. Maybe Mo's idea to build a lookout den will help pass the time.
Dragon Boat Beats. It's Supertato versus Evil Pea in the Dragon Boat Race on Ice. On your marks, get set, go!
Squiggle. Bing and Coco are drawing Gilly a picture, but when Bing goes to say hello, Charlie does a big squiggle on Bing's drawing! Gilly then shows them a game called 'squiggling!'.
Pig Gets Big. Felix causes chaos as a giant pig, but Mojo and Bo are right on his huge, curly tail!
Frog Song. It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.
The Counting Badge. The Squirrels try the ultimate achievement of counting to 100.
Wild Girls. Coco wants to play 'wild girls' with Indy, but Chloe wants her to try another game.
The Show. On Mother's Day, Bluey puts on a play about how Mum and Dad first met.
Go Jet Academy: Stop Those Superweeds. Some fast-growing plants that don't belong on Academy Island are in danger of taking over!
The Tale of the Thing-A-Ma-Jig. Animated reimagining of Beatrix Potter's children's classic. The rabbits endeavour to find out the function of Mr Bouncer's new invention.
The Crab and Urchin. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his band of explorers. Barnacles and Kwazii investigate a disruption involving a crab on a nearby reef.
The Terrible Twos. Children's animation. Double trouble as Four splits and a pair of tricky twins turn up - the Terrible Twos, who decide it's time to tickle their friends to pieces.
Hill. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. L discovers that bath time is more fun when you double up.
Norman Is My Name. After a concert at the music festival, Nick returns to the caravan for a spot of lunch - but what's that funny smell? Is it Norman again?
Honey Bee Hijack. Glitch creates a sticky situation when he borrows every bee in the world to make honey.
Fetch. Preschool series. Chloe and Topsy are playing a game of fetch in the park, or at least they're trying to, but Topsy doesn't seem to quite understand the rules.
Puppet Show. Bing and Sula are doing a puppet show for Flop, Amma and Pando, and Coco wants to join in. But Bing's loud Biteysaurus isn't welcome, as he is hurting Sula's ears!
Unicorn. Dee encourages a friend to say 'unicorn', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a white unicorn, a sparkly one, a floating unicorn and meet a unicorn in uniform!
The Box. Lu and Barnaby can't agree on how to play with a cardboard box.
Night of the Shooting Stars. There are shooting stars, but Fiona is too hurt to climb. Rocket time!
More About Taller and Taller. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos watch a man cleaning the windows of a block of flats. They make his cleaning pole taller and taller.
Cinema. Justin and his friends visit the cinema to watch a very special funny film. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble directs his own film with a little help from all of his toys!
Again Again. Preschool fun from Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies can't get enough of the Tubby Custard Ride so they ask to go on it again and again!
Day Out. Babies and their grown-ups play with things themed around a day out.
Museum. Elsee plays I-spy at the museum with her new friend Qasim.

programmes.show_name: New: What's in Your Plant Pot?
programmes.show_description: Henna. Henna artist Pavan shows the Fact Pack her henna plant and explains how its leaves are used to create beautiful mehndi patterns.
Out of This World! Rebecca wants to meet a friendly space alien, so Murphi helps her make one - from a sock!
Wasabi's Big Day Off. When Wasabi injures his leg, Ginger and the Peas are forced to wait on him hand and foot.
Pirates. It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play pirates on the hammock swing. They'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.
The Telling Time Badge. John the Crab needs help planning a surprise party for Nigel. It will only work if everyone is on time with the preparations.   Followed by Hey Duggee.
Mermaids and Octopus Tree Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers hop like mermaids and spot a big red bridge on a walk to donate books!
Meet Audrey's Family. Audrey makes a pizza for her family, followed by a fun board game. But who will win?
Sienna's Nigerian Jollof Rice. Sienna is cooking Nigerian jollof rice. Her dad has prepared a colourful Nigerian salad to eat with the rice, and some Nigerian chin chin too.
Pups in Training. Pup-pup-POW! Dog Squad are back, and it's puppy cadet training day, when pups all over Woofton see if they've got what it takes to become a real-life assistance dog.
Waffle Walkies. Preschool comedy drama series. Simon and Evie take Waffle for a walk, but an overenthusiastic Waffle drags Simon through the park, soaking him under a sprinkler.
Baba's Picnic. Baba and Mossy find a picnic feast for all the friends.
Fly Away Feathers. Yukee and the garden gang help a touring musical pigeon get back in the air.
Bicycle Bell. A bicycle ride with Dad soon turns into an intergalactic space adventure. Maddie and Triggs imagine themselves as brave explorers, shooting like rockets into the unknown.
The Election Badge. When Eugene unexpectedly drops out of running the summer fair, Duggee and the Squirrels hold an election to choose the best candidate for the job.
Double Duets. It's time for karaoke in Numberland. A nervous One discovers that doubling up is a great way to have a friend by your side - and it makes singing twice as fun!
Pip. At bedtime, Alphablock P tries to get her pet, Pip, to SIT, relax with a PAT, and SIP a drink from a TAP. Exhausted, she takes a NAP, and Pip falls asleep too... or does she?
Under the Sea. Fishy fun with Justin and his friends as they visit an aquarium and meet a diver. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble in on the hunt for some underwater treasure!
Picnic. Preschool series. The Teletubbies go on a special picnic together. Lots of tubby toast pops out of the Dup Dup and lands on the picnic plates for the Teletubbies to munch.
Acorns. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about acorns.
Three Lions. Theo goes to get a new ball and thinks he's found a lion.
Helpful Machines. CBeebies' Grace shows off three amazing machines that can help other machines!
Gastornis and Egg. Preschool adventure series. Andy heads 49 million years back in time to find out the colour of a prehistoric bird's eggs.
Kite Day. Love Monster is learning to fly a kite but decides to try the largest one of all, the dragon kite, before he is ready and causes mayhem in Fluffytown.
Wild Windstorms. Dashi pilots the Octoray through wild windstorms in Antarctica and New Zealand.
The Tale of the Giant Pumpkin. Animated series. When Peter sets his sights on the biggest pumpkin in Mr McGregor's patch, rolling it home turns into the ride of a lifetime.
The Round Up Badge. The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands and earn their Round Up Badges!
Vida's Wandering Wonders. When Vida's vet bag goes missing, she and her Sweetwoodian friends need to track it down.
Trolley Cruise. Supertato, Carrot and Broccoli get free tickets to go on a luxurious trolley cruise, but it's actually a one-way ticket out of the supermarket from Evil Pea!
Mission Dance. Weasy and the ducklings compete playing a dance video game. Their rivalry ends when the Chipmunk gets the highest score and won't stop boasting.
Ice Cream Float. Betty's ice cream is lifting everyone off the ground. Mojo and Bo need to get them down.
Wild Girls. Coco wants to play 'wild girls' with Indy, but Chloe wants her to try another game.
Piri-O-UFO. Nugget adopts a lost mini alien as a pet until the gang convince her to let it go home.
The Show. On Mother's Day, Bluey puts on a play about how Mum and Dad first met.
Andy and the Alamosaurus. Andy and Jen have an epic adventure on Dino Island with the mighty Alamosaurus.
Waffle and the Box. A mysterious box is delivered to Mrs Hobbs' house, and Waffle wants to know what's inside.
The Talk to Animals Wish. Rafi's wish to talk to animals causes confusion. She realises real magic is listening when she helps a sparrow find its family.
It's Time to Visit the Art Gallery. JoJo and Gran Gran visit the art gallery with the hope of finding panda paintings.
Pillow Fill. Animation for preschool children. Scarf Lady helps Sarah and Duck catch the fluffs and puffs to refill their pancaked pillows.
Star Flower. Animation about a family of small creatures who live on, and inside, a planet. Small Clanger is fishing in the music boat and catches a beautiful silver seed.
Full. MeMo and BaBa enjoy filling and emptying different containers. MeMo is careful not to overfill a jug with water. BaBa and MeMo fill bowls with sand to make sandcastles.
The Tombliboos Build an Arch. Adventures in a magical forest. The Tombliboos build a brick arch and the Pontipine children a stone arch. They go under and through.
Billie Eilish - This Moose Belongs to Me. Singer-songwriter Billie Eilish reads This Moose Belongs to Me.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Grapes. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the spectacular acrobatic Grapes working together to perform the most difficult structures to perfection.
Choosing. Children's animation. Bing has enough money to buy one thing in Padget's shop, but he finds it hard to choose between all the lovely things.
Up High. Preschool series. The Teletubbies bounce on the Tubby Bouncy. Po bounces as high as a cloud, then Laa-Laa and Dipsy bounce higher and Tinky Winky bounces highest of all.
Party. Mo is having a party for her friends and Tee just won't go to bed - he doesn't want to miss out! Luckily, Mo thinks of a way to allow Tee to join in the fun and get him off to sleep.
How to Be a Supertato. In Tato Tower, Supertato shows the Grape Kids a film on how to be a Supertato like him.
PJ Party. Bing is sleeping at Sula's house but has forgotten Hoppity!
Pow Tao. Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?
What's Hot. The Squirrels build a bug home, the Penguins tell us what's hot, and Norrie sings a song.
The What Happened Badge. The Squirrels try and tell us what has just happened.
TV Shop. At the chemist, Bluey, Bingo and their friends have fun playing with the CCTV screens.
Tickle Crabs. When Dad brings a pair of tenacious tickle crabs home from the beach, nowhere in the house is safe! His only hope of escaping their tickles is with the help of his true love.
The Blarney Stone, Ireland. Kyan finds he has to use some super smooth talking to save the tourists and protect Blarney Castle from Glitch's plan to get the gift of the gab.
The Tale of the Big Bad Badger. Animated series. When Tommy Brock decides to move into the Farmyard, Mittens needs Peter Rabbit's help to evict him!
The Walrus Chief. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his band of explorers. When Peso's precious medical kit is taken, Barnacles and Kwazii try to get it back.
Holes. Children's animation. Five and friends discover a hole that makes their heads fall off! Learn how to count up and down and how to add to five with the Numberblocks.
Van. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. J is convinced she's a jaybird - but she just can't seem to fly.
Valerie the Vampire. Nick and Norman get some help from a vampire bat called Valerie to write a Popcast song for their spooky party.
...of the Unexpected Discovery. Peter Rabbit Special: The Tale of the Unexpected Discovery. After Peter saves a friend, he is rewarded with something very special.
Recorder Practice. Preschool series. Chloe is practising her recorder for school assembly, when a curious Topsy decides to join in with the music.
Charlie Did It. Bing teaches Charlie how to throw but accidentally knocks the fruit over.
Raspberry. Dee encourages a friend to say 'raspberry', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a red raspberry, a fancy hat raspberry and even meet Princess Raspberry!
Spotty Rocket. Gus gets upset when he can't finish his rocket the way that he'd planned.
Biggy Boulder. The full moon makes Wilf howl so loudly that a rockslide blocks Brian's door. The Piggies must help Brian escape and find a way to stop Wilf from howling.
More About Shorter and Shorter. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos watch a man winding up a hosepipe, making it shorter and shorter.
Eye Test. Justin and his friends learn all about getting their eyes tested. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble helps Grandad Tumble with some new glasses when he loses his old pair.
Tall Tower. Preschool series. Laa-Laa has fun watching Dipsy stretch up like a tall tower. The Tubby Toaster goes crazy and fires out Tubby Toast which ends up in a tall tower.
Bathtime. Nigel and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore bathtime toys and objects through discovery, play, song and story. Babies and grown-ups at home can join in too!
Forest. Elsee plays I-spy in a beautiful forest with her new friend Raffaella.

programmes.show_name: New: What's in Your Plant Pot?
programmes.show_description: Sweetcorn. Allotment gardener Chloe tells us how sweetcorn plants grow and how popcorn pops!
Quiet, Please! Rebecca is engrossed in her new book, but Murphi needs feeding. To help deal with his hunger, Rebecca works with him to make tiger bread toast.
Babies on Board. The gang leads a herd of baby Vegesaurs on a sneak and peek adventure across the valley.
Grannies. A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.
The Puzzle Badge. The Squirrels are close to finishing a jigsaw puzzle.   Followed by Hey Duggee.
Giant Tree and Steep Hill Walk. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers find a giant tree and play chase in a maze on a walk to climb a steep hill!
Queen Audrey Goes to the Beach. Audrey plays at being a queen and holds a royal tea party.
Ben's German Zwiebelkuchen. Talented young chef Ben is cooking his favourite dish, German zwiebelkuchen, an onion tart made from pastry, onion and German ham.
...Like It at Shakespeare's Globe. A host of CBeebies stars perform As You Like It at Shakespeare's Globe.
Cave Camping. The Puffin family take a fun trip to the underwater cave.
I'm a Little Raindrop. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. Ruby sings an upbeat techno song, where she imagines what it's like to be a raindrop.
Staying Up Late. The garden gang are intrigued when Yukee says she's going to show them the Man in the Moon.
Leaves. While playing in the garden, Maddie and Triggs make a new friend named Reginald. They soon discover that crunchy leaves mean much more to this tiny little caterpillar.
The Game Show Badge. The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a game show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.
Double Doors, Double Locked. When Numberblocks One to Five take on Fifteen's challenge to unlock every door, they need help from the Super Special Secret Step Squad.
C Versus K. Alphablocks C and K want to be the only one to make their sound. C makes CAT and CAP. K makes KID and KIT. They are happy when they realise that they make different words.
Farmyard Fun. Meet some cute alpacas with Justin and his friend as they visit a farm, while Mr Tumble, Grandad Tumble and Aunt Polly sing Old MacDonald at the farmyard dance.
Honk Honk. Preschool series. The Teletubbies hear a 'honk honk' and the Tubby Car approaches. The Tubby Car drives them across Teletubbyland as they sing the Tubby Car song.
Avocado. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the fabulous Avocados singing an operatic piece in their three unique voices!
Wind. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about wind.
The Sack. The Fantastics playfully sack Georgie. Jaz is appointed as the team's new coach but finds it harder than she thought. Georgie tries her hand at other jobs - with chaotic results.
Emergency Machines. CBeebies' motorbike rider Grace shows off three amazing emergency machines.
Sleepover Night. Love Monster is excited about his first sleepover night with Tiniest Fluffiest Bunny, but is confused when he finds out that they have very different bedtime routines.
Siberian Salamander. While rescuing Paani's gear from an icy river, the Octonauts discover a frozen salamander.
The Tale of the Peekaboo Rabbit. Animated series. Benjamin and Cotton-tail become lost in the Shadowy Woods during a game of peekaboo. Can Peter help them elude a prowling Mr Tod?
The Favourite Badge. The Squirrels learn what a favourite is but can't decide on their own choices.
Tidbit's Achy Ankles. Tidbit sprains his ankles before performing, so Fergie teaches him wheelchair dance moves.
Couch Potato. Evil Pea tries to trap Supertato down the back of a sofa but falls in too. Luckily, they meet Raisin, who lives there with her buttons and knows the only way out.
Mission Basketball. Weasy teams up with the cheating Chipmunk to win a game of basketball.
Who Duggit? A mystery is afoot! Somebody's been digging up and running off with Jackson's giant vegetables. Detectives Mojo and Bo must follow the clues to the cagey culprit.
TV Shop. At the chemist, Bluey, Bingo and their friends have fun playing with the CCTV screens.
Nugget's Nuglets. Nugget annoys Pancake with constant demands while ill in bed. To say sorry, she makes him a special bracelet. But Nugget is upset when others get 'nuglets' too.
Tickle Crabs. When Dad brings a pair of tenacious tickle crabs home from the beach, nowhere in the house is safe! His only hope of escaping their tickles is with the help of his true love.
Andy and the Runaway Ankylosaurus. Andy and Jen embark on an epic adventure across Dino Island with a runaway Ankylosaurus.
Waffle's Rehearsal. The Poodles' Class rehearse for the school show, and Waffle has a special line to sing.
The Multi Rafi Wish. Rafi's wish makes four colourful Rafis appear. She decides to organise each Rafi so that they focus on one job each before merging back into one.
It's Time to Press a Flower. JoJo and Gran Gran use books to press a flower so that it will last for a long time.
Castle Scribbling. Animation for preschool children. During Sarah and Duck's visit to a castle, their drawings lead them to an exciting discovery.
The Block. A strange robot block lands on the Clangers' planet, and seems to be carrying out scientific investigations.
Purple Ducky. MeMo and BaBa play with a new toy at the Play Tree. When the toy breaks, MeMo wants to find another toy, but BaBa shows MeMo that there are other ways to play.
Makka Pakka's Stone Concert. Preschool series set in a magical garden. Makka Pakka discovers he can make musical notes by tapping different stones.
Ke Huy Quan - Brian the Lion Who Learned. Ke Huy Quan reads a warm and wise story about the mightiest, bitiest lion called Brian.
